$comment: Generated deterministically from UCF onboarding profile 1.0.0 models; do not edit by hand. Cross-document identity, reference, candidate, decision, materialization, trust, and summary checks remain runtime semantics.
title: UCF deterministic onboarding bundle profile 1.0.0
x-ucf-runtime-semantic-checks: strict UTF-8 and duplicate-member JSON decoding

exact discovery capability and profile coordinates

closed proposal graph topology and required input bindings
